pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to a newer patch release.
Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project intends to run on Java 21; keeping 17 would result in bytecode incompatible with the target runtime or missing new language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate JAXB API dependency from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.xml.bind package was removed from the JDK and is not available in Spring Boot 3/Jakarta EE environments; code using JAXB will fail to compile or find classes at runtime without the jakarta namespace.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Flyway PostgreSQL database driver dependency required for Flyway 10+.
pom.xml.why_exists: Flyway 10+ removed the built-in database drivers; without this explicit dependency, Flyway will fail at runtime with a 'Database driver not found' error when connecting to PostgreSQL.
